content:
# elizaos/docs Weekly Report (May 3 - 9, 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for the week of May 3–9, 2026, was focused on enhancing the security posture of the ElizaOS DeFi ecosystem. The primary achievement was the expansion of the DeFi plugin registry documentation to incorporate token safety protocols. This initiative underscores the project's commitment to building secure, modular AI agent frameworks for Web3 environments.

## 🛠️ Key Developments

### DeFi Plugin Registry Expansion
The core technical focus this week was the integration of safety-oriented documentation for DeFi plugins. 
*   **Token Safety Integration:** Documentation was updated to include `SafeAgent` features, providing users and developers with clearer guidance on maintaining token safety within the DeFi plugin ecosystem. This work is captured in [#84](https://github.com/elizaos/docs/pull/84), which remains open and under review.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
*   **Closed Issues:** There were no issues closed during this reporting period.
*   **New & Active Issues:** No new issues were opened, and there are currently no active issues tracked in the repository for this week.

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
Collaboration this week centered on the review process for the documentation update regarding `SafeAgent`. As PR [#84](https://github.com/elizaos/docs/pull/84) is currently awaiting review, the community is actively engaged in ensuring the accuracy and safety standards of the DeFi plugin registry documentation. No other community-wide discussions or new contributor activity were recorded during this period.
